1<?php
2
3namespace Local\Permission\Models;
4
5use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
6use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsToMany;
7use InvalidArgumentException;
8
9/**
10 * @property int $id
11 * @property string $name
12 * @property string $guard_name
13 * @property ?string $description
14 */
15class Permission extends Model
16{
17    protected $guarded = ['id'];
18
19    protected static function booted(): void
20    {
21        static::creating(function (self $permission) {
22            $permission->guard_name ??= static::defaultGuardName();
23        });
24    }
25
26    public function __construct(array $attributes = [])
27    {
28        parent::__construct($attributes);
29
30        $this->table = config('permission.table_names.permissions', 'permissions');
31    }
32
33    public function roles(): BelongsToMany
34    {
35        return $this->belongsToMany(
36            Role::class,
37            config('permission.table_names.role_has_permissions'),
38            'permission_id',
39            'role_id'
40        );
41    }
42
43    public static function findByName(string $name, ?string $guardName = null): self
44    {
45        $guardName ??= static::defaultGuardName();
46
47        $permission = static::query()->where('name', $name)->where('guard_name', $guardName)->first();
48
49        if ($permission === null) {
50            throw new InvalidArgumentException("Permission [{$name}] does not exist.");
51        }
52
53        return $permission;
54    }
55
56    public static function findOrCreate(string $name, ?string $guardName = null): self
57    {
58        $guardName ??= static::defaultGuardName();
59
60        return static::query()->firstOrCreate(
61            ['name' => $name, 'guard_name' => $guardName]
62        );
63    }
64
65    protected static function defaultGuardName(): string
66    {
67        return config('auth.defaults.guard', 'web');
68    }
69}

Legend

Covered by small (and larger) testsCovered by medium (and large) testsCovered by large tests (and tests of unknown size)Not coveredNot coverable
